scripts.build:client: cd client && npm ci && VITE_BASE=/ VITE_API_BASE=/api VITE_SOCKET_PATH=/socket.io VITE_ADMIN_PATH=/admin-2026 npm run build
scripts.build:server: cd server && npm ci && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.start: cd server && npm run prisma:migrate && node index.js
